title: Reverse a String
problem: Write a function to reverse a string without using built-in reverse().
explanation: Iterate from last character to first and build reversed string. Alternative recursive solution.

title: Check if String is Palindrome
problem: Write a function to check if a string is a palindrome.
explanation: Remove non-alphanumeric characters, compare from both ends. Or reverse and compare.

title: Count Character Frequencies
problem: Write a function to count character frequencies in a string.
explanation: Iterate through string and count occurrences in object or Map.

title: First Non-Repeating Character
problem: Write a function to find the first non-repeating character in a string.
explanation: First pass counts all characters. Second pass finds first with count of 1.

title: Check if Strings are Anagrams
problem: Write a function to check whether two strings are anagrams.
explanation: Sort both strings and compare, or use frequency map for O(n) efficiency.

title: Capitalize First Letter of Every Word
problem: Write a function to capitalize the first letter of every word in a sentence.
explanation: Split by spaces and capitalize first char of each word, or use regex with word boundary.

title: Remove Duplicate Characters
problem: Write a function to remove duplicate characters from a string.
explanation: Use Set for unique characters. Set automatically removes duplicates.

title: Compress String
problem: Write a function to compress a string like "aaabbc" into "a3b2c1".
explanation: Iterate through and count consecutive characters, build compressed string.

title: Find Longest Word in Sentence
problem: Write a function to find the longest word in a sentence.
explanation: Split by spaces and find word with maximum length.

title: Safely Parse JSON
problem: Write a function to safely parse JSON and return null on invalid input.
explanation: Wrap JSON.parse in try-catch to handle parse errors gracefully.

title: Remove Duplicates from Array
problem: Write a function to remove duplicates from an array.
explanation: Use Set for primitives, or filter with Set/object for complex types.

title: Flatten Nested Array
problem: Write a function to flatten a nested array of unknown depth.
explanation: Recursive approach checks if item is array and flattens recursively.

title: Find Second Largest Number
problem: Write a function to find the second largest number in an array.
explanation: Sort descending and get second element, or track largest/second in single pass.

title: Rotate Array by k Positions
problem: Write a function to rotate an array by k positions.
explanation: Slice and concat or use three reversals for O(1) space complexity.

title: Move All Zeroes to End
problem: Write a function to move all zeroes to the end of an array.
explanation: Filter non-zeros and append zeros, or use two-pointer in-place swap.

title: Find Intersection of Two Arrays
problem: Write a function to find the intersection of two arrays.
explanation: Convert one array to Set, filter other array by set membership.

title: Find Union of Two Arrays
problem: Write a function to find the union of two arrays.
explanation: Combine arrays and remove duplicates using Set.

title: Group Array of Objects by Key
problem: Write a function to group an array of objects by a key.
explanation: Reduce over array, accumulating items grouped by key value.

title: Sort Array of Objects by Timestamp
problem: Write a function to sort an array of objects by timestamp.
explanation: Use array.sort() with comparison of Date objects from timestamp fields.

title: Deep Clone an Object
problem: Write a function to deep clone an object without using libraries.
explanation: Recursively clone objects, arrays, and dates. JSON method simple but loses functions.

title: Compare Objects for Deep Equality
problem: Write a function to compare two objects for deep equality.
explanation: Recursively compare keys and values of objects.

title: Convert Array into Chunks
problem: Write a function to convert an array into chunks of size k.
explanation: Slice array into k-sized chunks or use reduce to accumulate.

title: Find Duplicates and Return Counts
problem: Write a function to find duplicates in an array and return their counts.
explanation: Count all items, filter those with count > 1.

title: Merge Two Sorted Arrays
problem: Write a function to merge two sorted arrays.
explanation: Combine and sort, or use two pointers for O(n) merging.

title: Find Missing Number from 1 to n
problem: Write a function to find the missing number in an array from 1 to n.
explanation: Use sum formula or iterate with Set for O(n) time.

title: Two Sum Problem
problem: Write a function to solve Two Sum (find two numbers that sum to target).
explanation: Use hash map to track seen numbers and find complement for each number.

title: Top k Most Frequent Elements
problem: Write a function to return the top k most frequent elements in an array.
explanation: Count frequencies, sort by count descending, return top k.

title: Find Majority Element
problem: Write a function to find the majority element in an array.
explanation: Count frequencies or use Boyer-Moore algorithm for O(1) space.

title: Count Word Frequencies in Sentence
problem: Write a function to count how many times each word appears in a sentence.
explanation: Split by whitespace, clean punctuation, count each word.

title: Find All Pairs with Target Sum
problem: Write a function to find all pairs in an array whose sum equals a target.
explanation: Use Set to track seen numbers, find complements, avoid duplicates with sorted pairs.

title: Find All Triplets with Sum Zero
problem: Write a function to find all unique triplets whose sum equals zero.
explanation: Sort array, fix one element, use two pointers to find pairs that sum to -element.

title: Detect Duplicates Within Distance k
problem: Write a function to detect whether an array contains duplicates within distance k.
explanation: Use sliding window Set of size k+1, check if current element is in window.

title: Find First Repeated Number
problem: Write a function to return the first repeated number in an array.
explanation: Track seen numbers, return first duplicate found.

title: Flatten Nested Object
problem: Write a recursive function to flatten a nested object.
explanation: Recursively traverse object, concatenating keys with dots for nested properties.

title: Calculate Factorial Recursively
problem: Write a recursive function to calculate factorial.
explanation: Base case at 0/1, recursive case multiplies by previous factorial.

title: Generate Fibonacci Numbers
problem: Write a recursive function to generate Fibonacci numbers up to n.
explanation: Iterative approach most efficient. Each term is sum of previous two.

title: Traverse Tree-like JSON Structure
problem: Write a recursive function to traverse a tree-like JSON structure.
explanation: Recursively visit node, then recursively visit all children.

title: DFS on Graph (Adjacency List)
problem: Write a function to perform DFS on a graph stored as an adjacency list.
explanation: Mark visited, visit current, recursively visit unvisited neighbors.

title: BFS on Graph (Adjacency List)
problem: Write a function to perform BFS on a graph stored as an adjacency list.
explanation: Use queue for level-order traversal. Visit neighbors level by level.

title: Detect Cycle in Directed Graph
problem: Write a function to detect a cycle in a directed graph.
explanation: Use DFS with recursion stack. Cycle exists if visiting node already in stack.

title: Promise Resolving After Delay
problem: Write a function that returns a Promise resolving after n milliseconds.

title: Run Async Functions in Sequence
problem: Write a function to run three async functions in sequence.

title: Run Async Tasks in Parallel
problem: Write a function to run async tasks in parallel and collect results.

title: Limit Concurrency to k Async Tasks
problem: Write a function to limit concurrency to k async tasks at a time.

title: Retry Wrapper for Async Function
problem: Write a retry wrapper for an async function with max retries.

title: Retry with Exponential Backoff
problem: Write a retry wrapper with exponential backoff.

title: Timeout Wrapper for Promise
problem: Write a timeout wrapper for a Promise.

title: Implement Promise.all
problem: Write your own Promise.all implementation.

title: Implement Promise.race
problem: Write your own Promise.race implementation.

title: Poll API Until Condition Met
problem: Write a function that polls an API every 5 seconds until a condition is met.

title: Debounce Function
problem: Write your own debounce function.

title: Throttle Function
problem: Write your own throttle function.

title: Once Function
problem: Write your own once function.

title: Memoize Function
problem: Write your own memoize function.

title: Implement Map Function
problem: Write your own map function.

title: Implement Filter Function
problem: Write your own filter function.

title: Implement Reduce Function
problem: Write your own reduce function.

title: Compose Multiple Functions
problem: Write a function to compose multiple functions from right to left.

title: Pipe Multiple Functions
problem: Write a function to pipe multiple functions from left to right.

title: LRU Cache Implementation
problem: Write an LRU cache implementation.

title: Cache with TTL Support
problem: Write a simple in-memory cache with TTL support.

title: Generate Unique Request ID
problem: Write a function to generate a unique request ID.

title: Express Health Check Route
problem: Write a basic Express server with one health-check route.

title: Express GET /users/:id Route
problem: Write an Express route for GET /users/:id.

title: Express POST /users with Body Validation
problem: Write an Express route for POST /users with body validation.

title: Express Logging Middleware
problem: Write middleware to log method, URL, status code, and response time.

title: Express Error Handling Middleware
problem: Write middleware for centralized error handling.

title: Express API Key Validation
problem: Write middleware to validate an API key from headers.

title: Express Required Fields Middleware
problem: Write middleware to check whether required fields exist in the request body.

title: Express Rate Limiting Middleware
problem: Write middleware to rate-limit requests in memory.

title: Express Pagination Route
problem: Write a route that supports pagination using page and limit.

title: Express Filtering by Query Params
problem: Write a route that supports filtering by query params like status and priority.

title: Express Sorting Route
problem: Write a route that supports sorting by createdAt ascending or descending.

title: Express File Upload Route
problem: Write an Express route to upload a file and save metadata.

title: Express Consistent JSON Response
problem: Write an endpoint that returns a consistent JSON response format for success and error cases.

title: CRUD Operations on Tasks
problem: Write code for CRUD operations on a tasks collection.

title: Soft Delete Implementation
problem: Write code for soft delete instead of hard delete.

title: Idempotent POST Endpoint
problem: Write code for an idempotent POST /orders endpoint using an idempotency key.

title: Redis Job Queue
problem: Write code for a background job producer and worker using Redis.

title: Email Job Queue and Status
problem: Write code to enqueue an email job and update job status.

title: Job Status Endpoints
problem: Write code to expose POST /jobs and GET /jobs/:id/status.

title: Redis Caching with Invalidation
problem: Write code to cache a DB response in Redis and invalidate it on update.

title: Per-User Request Counter in Redis
problem: Write code for a per-user request counter stored in Redis.

title: JWT Login Implementation
problem: Write code to implement login and issue a JWT.

title: JWT Route Protection
problem: Write code to protect a route using JWT verification.

title: Password Hashing and Verification
problem: Write code to hash a password and verify it during login.

title: Refresh Token Implementation
problem: Write code to refresh an access token using a refresh token.

title: Redis Session Storage
problem: Write code to store sessions in Redis.

title: Request Correlation IDs
problem: Write code to implement request correlation IDs across middleware and logs.

title: Graceful Server Shutdown
problem: Write code to gracefully shut down an Express server on SIGTERM.

title: SQL: Fetch Latest 10 Users
problem: Write a SQL query to fetch the latest 10 users.
solution: SELECT * FROM users ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 10;

title: SQL: Users with More Than 3 Orders
problem: Write a SQL query to fetch users with more than 3 orders.
solution:
SELECT users.* FROM users
JOIN orders ON users.id = orders.userId
GROUP BY users.id
HAVING COUNT(orders.id) > 3;

title: SQL: Second Highest Salary
problem: Write a SQL query to return the second highest salary.

title: SQL: Find Duplicate Emails
problem: Write a SQL query to find duplicate email addresses in a table.
solution: SELECT email FROM users GROUP BY email HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;

title: SQL: Pagination with LIMIT and OFFSET
problem: Write a SQL query to paginate results using LIMIT and OFFSET.
solution:
-- Page 2 with 10 items per page
SELECT * FROM users ORDER BY id LIMIT 10 OFFSET 10;

title: SQL: Total Orders Per User
problem: Write a SQL query to return total orders per user.
solution: SELECT userId, COUNT(*) as totalOrders FROM orders GROUP BY userId;

title: SQL: Users with No Orders
problem: Write a SQL query to join users and orders and return users with no orders.
solution: SELECT users.* FROM users LEFT JOIN orders ON users.id = orders.userId WHERE orders.id IS NULL;

title: SQL: Update Based on Another Table
problem: Write a SQL query to update one table based on values in another.
solution: UPDATE users SET isActive = 0 WHERE id IN (SELECT userId FROM inactiveAccounts);

title: SQL: Soft Delete Inactive Users
problem: Write a SQL query to soft delete inactive users.
solution: UPDATE users SET deletedAt = NOW() WHERE lastLoginAt < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 90 DAY) AND deletedAt IS NULL;

title: SQL: Monthly Counts Grouped by Month
problem: Write a SQL query to return monthly counts grouped by month.
solution: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', createdAt) as month, COUNT(*) as count FROM orders GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', createdAt) ORDER BY month;

title: MongoDB: Fetch Active Users
problem: Write a MongoDB query to fetch all active users.
solution: db.users.find({ isActive: true });

title: MongoDB: Documents from Last 7 Days
problem: Write a MongoDB query to fetch documents created in the last 7 days.
solution: db.documents.find({ createdAt: { $gte: new Date(Date.now() - 7*24*60*60*1000) } });

title: MongoDB: Pagination and Sorting
problem: Write a MongoDB query to paginate and sort results.
solution: db.users.find().sort({ createdAt: -1 }).skip(20).limit(10);

title: MongoDB: Aggregation Pipeline Count
problem: Write a MongoDB aggregation pipeline to group orders by user and count them.

title: MongoDB: Monthly Signups
problem: Write a MongoDB aggregation pipeline to return monthly signups.

title: MongoDB: Create Index
problem: Write code to create an index for a frequently queried field.
solution:
db.users.createIndex({ email: 1 });
db.orders.createIndex({ userId: 1, createdAt: -1 });

title: MongoDB: Push to Array
problem: Write a MongoDB update query to push an item into an array.
solution: db.users.updateOne({ _id: userId }, { $push: { tags: 'newTag' } });

title: MongoDB: Update Nested Fields
problem: Write a MongoDB update query to update nested fields.
solution: db.users.updateOne({ _id: userId }, { $set: { 'profile.age': 25, 'profile.city': 'NYC' } });

title: MongoDB: Array Contains Value
problem: Write a MongoDB query to find documents where an array contains a value.
solution:
db.users.find({ tags: 'javascript' });
db.users.find({ tags: { $in: ['javascript', 'python'] } });

title: MongoDB: Soft Delete
problem: Write a MongoDB query to soft delete documents.
solution:
db.users.updateOne({ _id: userId }, { $set: { deletedAt: new Date(), isDeleted: true } });
db.users.find({ isDeleted: { $ne: true } }); // Fetch active

title: DynamoDB: Put Item
problem: Write code to put an item into DynamoDB.

title: DynamoDB: Get Item by Partition Key
problem: Write code to get an item by partition key.

title: DynamoDB: Query with Sort Key
problem: Write code to query DynamoDB using partition key and sort key.

title: DynamoDB: Query GSI
problem: Write code to query a GSI in DynamoDB.

title: DynamoDB: Update Attribute
problem: Write code to update one attribute in a DynamoDB item.

title: DynamoDB: Set TTL
problem: Write code to set TTL for a DynamoDB item.

title: Redis: Increment Counter Safely
problem: Write code to increment a Redis counter safely.

title: Redis: Sliding Window Rate Limiter
problem: Write code to implement a sliding-window rate limiter in Redis.

title: Redis: Pub/Sub
problem: Write code to publish and subscribe using Redis pub/sub.

title: Redis: Distributed Locking
problem: Write code to implement distributed locking with Redis.

title: Mini: URL Shortener Service
problem: Write a small URL shortener service.

title: Mini: Note-Taking API
problem: Write a note-taking API with CRUD, tags, and search.

title: Mini: Ticket Management API
problem: Write a ticket management API with status transitions.

title: Mini: Nested Comments System
problem: Write a comment system with nested replies.

title: Mini: Webhook Receiver
problem: Write a webhook receiver that validates signatures and stores payloads.

title: Mini: Audit Logging Module
problem: Write an audit logging module for create, update, and delete actions.

title: Mini: Notification Service with Retries
problem: Write a notification service that retries failed sends.

title: Mini: CSV Import Endpoint
problem: Write a CSV import endpoint that processes data in the background.

title: Mini: Task Scheduler for Delayed Jobs
problem: Write a task scheduler that executes delayed jobs.

title: Mini: Leaderboard API
problem: Write a leaderboard API using Redis sorted sets.
